name: google-search-console-mcp
description: MCP server for Google Search Console API - Query search performance, inspect URLs, manage sitemaps, and analyze SEO metrics

tools.name: search_analytics
tools.description: Query search performance data including impressions, clicks, CTR, and position

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List all Search Console properties the service account has access to

tools.name: url_inspection
tools.description: Inspect a specific URL to get indexing and crawling information

tools.name: sitemaps
tools.description: List all sitemaps or get information about a specific sitemap

tools.name: quick_insights
tools.description: Get pre-configured reports for common Search Console insights

tools.name: index_coverage
tools.description: Get index coverage data and issues for your property

tools.name: list_tools
tools.description: Get a list of all available Search Console tools and their descriptions

GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS.description: JSON string containing the complete Google service account credentials
